title: The Best Login
description: This is a high-quality mod for authorization in minecraft!
body:
# The Best Login

The Best Login is an authentication mod for Minecraft that makes logging
into a server clean, clear, and convenient for regular players.

The mod removes unnecessary confusion around registration and login,
supports auto-login, prevents passwords from being exposed in the
regular chat, and keeps key control on the server side. As a result,
players get a clear login flow, while administrators get a strict and
predictable authentication system without unnecessary noise.

## Features

-   user-friendly screens for login, registration, and password change
-   auto-login via local client storage
-   server-side action blocking until login is confirmed
-   separate chat mode as a fallback scenario
-   admin commands for unregistering and changing passwords
-   data storage in JSON files

## Main Commands

-   `/thebestlogin`
-   `/login`, `/log`
-   `/register`, `/reg`
-   `/changepassword`, `/cp`
-   `/thebestloginchat ...`
-   `/thebestlogin unregister <nickname>`
-   `/thebestlogin changepasswordnick <nickname> <password>`
-   `/thebestlogin reload`

For more details, see the documentation:
https://github.com/biravijet-ux/The-Best-Login/wiki
